svg.title: Aarambh Bank runtime architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture on a white card. The user's browser talks to the Streamlit UI, which calls the feature logic. Feature logic reads and writes through the data-access layer to MySQL. The chat feature also calls the AI layer, which asks the OpenAI API for SQL and runs a guarded read-only query through the data-access layer. Secrets come from a .env file.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user see in the browser?')
sendPrompt('What does the data-access layer do?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI layer guard the SQL?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the MySQL database?')

svg.text: secrets from .env — OpenAI key + DB credentials, never logged
